introSection: Tanjora is a Bolliger & Mabillard inverted roller coaster located at Wonderla Amusement Park Chennai in Illalur, Tamil Nadu, India.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Lightning opened at Kuwait Entertainment City in 2004. It was identical to the Batman clones at various Six Flags parks. It had an orange track and gray supports. Lightning closed along with the park on 5 June 2016, and was taken down in 2020.

The coaster was then reported to been sold to Wonderla Amusement Park Chennai. It was later repainted with orange track and blue supports. The coaster opened on 2 December 2025 as Tanjora.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content:
Orange track and blue supports. It had orange track and gray supports while at Kuwait Entertainment City.

The trains have teal chassis, black harnesses and purple wheel carrier covers. At Kuwait Entertainment City, the trains had light blue chassis and seats, yellow harnesses and multi color wheel carrier covers.

fullText:
Tanjora is a Bolliger & Mabillard inverted roller coaster located at Wonderla Amusement Park Chennai in Illalur, Tamil Nadu, India.

Lightning opened at Kuwait Entertainment City in 2004. It was identical to the Batman clones at various Six Flags parks. It had an orange track and gray supports. Lightning closed along with the park on 5 June 2016, and was taken down in 2020.

The coaster was then reported to been sold to Wonderla Amusement Park Chennai. It was later repainted with orange track and blue supports. The coaster opened on 2 December 2025 as Tanjora.





Orange track and blue supports. It had orange track and gray supports while at Kuwait Entertainment City.

The trains have teal chassis, black harnesses and purple wheel carrier covers. At Kuwait Entertainment City, the trains had light blue chassis and seats, yellow harnesses and multi color wheel carrier covers.
